history.content:
<thought>
I am at row 02, column B, facing right (>). Directly in front of me at (2,C) is lava, so I cannot move forward. To navigate towards the goal at (4,D), I need to change direction to go down. Rotating clockwise will make me face down, allowing me to move into the safe cell (3,B) next.
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
My current position is at row 2, column B, facing down. The goal is at row 4, column D. I can move forward to row 3, column B, which is an empty floor cell, and then continue downward and rightward to reach the goal while avoiding the lava at (2,C) and (3,C). Moving forward now is safe and a direct step towards the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row03, column B, facing down. The cell directly in front (row04, column B) is a floor cell, safe to move. This moves me closer to the goal at row04, column D. I will move forward.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 4, column B, facing down (`v`). The goal is at row 4, column D, which is to the east (right) of my current position. To face east, I need to rotate counter-clockwise (since turning clockwise from down would face west). 
</thought>
<action>
GIRA_ANTI_HORARIO
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing right. The goal is at row 04 column D. The path ahead is clear: cell (04,C) is floor, and then (04,D) is the goal. So I can move forward to approach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04, column C, facing right ('>'). The goal ('O') is at row 04, column D, directly in front of me. No lava or walls in the way. I can move forward to reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
FRENTE
</action>
